title: Server Pause
description: Backport of the MC 1.21.2 server pause feature to Fabric 1.17-1.21.1
body:
This Fabric mod is a backport of the new feature introduced in Minecraft 1.21.2 that allows the server to pause after a given time when there are no players present.

Similar to how it works in 1.21.2, a server admin can set `pause-when-empty-seconds` in server.properties. After this amount of seconds, the server will stop ticking the world etc. This brings down CPU usage significantly.
